final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 exploded-view reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering fineness are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部：中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语文字区
  左侧：结构拆解区，带中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写小图
  右上：材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附中文说明
  右中：纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本与文化解释
  底部：穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结文字区
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实写实人物全身站姿) wearing a complete 中国少数民族服饰 ensemble as the central subject — specific ethnic group and garment system chosen by the model for maximum visual richness and structural complexity; if a garment-object layout is more appropriate, replace figure with a central exploded-structure diagram while preserving all infographic zones
Scene/backdrop: must be a paper-texture background — 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, matte and archival in feel
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, evenly-lit scholarly atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, high-culture direction anchored by the ethnic garment's authentic color system — exact palette ratios and accent choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic textile surface rendering (silk, embroidery, woven brocade, dyed cloth as appropriate) — exact grain and sheen level are yours
Text (verbatim): must include the following Chinese text zones rendered clearly in simplified Chinese (简体中文), legible, no garbling, no pinyin, no English:
  顶部主标题区：自动生成适合所选民族服饰的主标题、副标题与导语
  左侧引线标注：关键部件名称（如领、袖、腰带、绣片、配饰等）
  右上说明区：材质与工艺说明文字
  右中说明区：纹样名称、主色色名、文化寓意解释
  底部流程区：穿着顺序步骤编号与核心特征总结条目
Constraints: must preserve all five layout zones; all in-image text must be simplified Chinese (简体中文), clear and typographically regular; structural annotations must correspond accurately to actual garment components; textile textures and patterns must reflect authentic ethnic craft
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce product-page feel, anime or cartoon style, cosplay feel, mismatched annotations, structurally incorrect labels, blurry or garbled text, fake or generic textures, excessive decorative elements
